feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Archiving DBTABLOG, lot of POWL_SELCRIT records
entry.content:
We are in process of doing Archiving of DBTABLOG, and I can see that the majority of records are related to POWL_SELCRIT.

Is there any reason to keep those archives, or can we just delete the archive related to POWL_SELCRIT table in DBTABLOG.

Should we just turn off logging for POWL_SELCRIT?

entry.title: Deleting Blog Post
entry.content:
Hello,

how can I delete an already published blog post?

thanks.

br Conny

entry.title: Where are my blogs I have linkedin my IDs and now what I have is a new id with no historical data
entry.content:
PL advise where are my previous blogs , posts, questions etc

Why do SAP have to keep changing something that works

entry.title: SAP BTP Cockpit free trail account - error "Service" broker
entry.content:
I am encountering an issue when attempting to execute the boost, which consistently fails with the following error message:

Service broker error: "Service" broker apimanagement-apiportal-trial failed with: "Forbidden"

In addition to this, I have attempted the following troubleshooting steps:

  1. Manually creating an instance of the service.
  2. Re-creating the sub-account associated with the service.

Unfortunately, neither of these approaches resolved the issue, and the error persists.

Does anyone happen to know what it could be?

entry.title: Apache Tomcat 9.0.98
entry.content:
hi everyone, can i know Apache Tomcat 9.0.98 or 97 is supporting/compatible with SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.2 Support Pack 8 Patch 12 (Version: 14.2.8.3978)?

or is there any website/link i can refer the compatibility.

entry.title: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other people" to "mentioned you"
entry.content:
In my Notification feed, I receive messages like this:

In fact, the message targets a bunch of people, so it's not really a message targeting me specifically:

Is it possible to change the message "@mentioned you in" to "@mentioned you and 11 other people in"?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How to influence Community 2024 developments?
entry.content:
Is there an official way to contact SAP Community to ask for some fixes or improvements of https://community.sap.com? Right now, I'm posting them at Questions about SAP Websites | SAP Community, hoping that SAP people are looking at it...

I couldn't find any "SAP Community" group at https://influence.sap.com.

EDIT: posting to Questions about SAP Websites | SAP Community seems the right path, as can be inferred from these two replies by @AnnePetteroe: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other... - SAP Community and Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", ins... - SAP Community.

entry.title: Consecuences of activating obsolete REPORTS? Is there any casuistics about it?
entry.content:
Greetings community,

As you know, in ECC, the transaction F.75/F_75 exists (and still works) and is considered obsolete in the S4H environment. However, there's a procedure that can be used to reactivate it, even though SAP clearly states that they won't be responsible for any system crashes that occur as a result of reactivating obsolete programs.

The question is: If a company executes this report, what tangible error has actually been reported due to activating this or, in general, any other obsolete REPORT?

Thanks for your comments!

entry.title: Post checks after RKS(Rolling Kernel Switch).
entry.content:
Hi There, 

Can anyone please help me with the list of post checks after the RKS is done.

Regards
Avin

entry.title: SAP Router (seclogin: Can't add credentials)
How to link to another section within same blog
entry.content:
Hi,

I am writing a blog and would like to add a link in the blog to another section within same blog post. 

I have already tried How to Add an Anchor Link to Jump to a Specific Part of a Page via HTML mode, it gives me an error and removes the ID created against the section header. 

Looking forward for a response.

thanks

entry.title: With the new revamped SCN from where I can access the Bookmarks repository
entry.content:
Hello all, 

With the below thread I was sure that something major with the Bookmarks feature has occurred,

https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/with-the-people-sap-com-getting-deprecated-will-the-bookmarks-get-affected/qaq-p/12817724

With the present forum, I am able to Bookmark a thread but am not able to find a place where I can see the links I have Bookmarked. I checked My Profile, My Contents and all other such possible places but no luck!

Is Bookmark feature still in beta stage ?

I have already lost a big Repo of bookmarks which I had 😞 , want to build it from scratch again aSAP!

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Where can I find my bookmarks in Community 2024?
entry.content: I can bookmark questions and other pages, but where can I find them later?

entry.title: Condition Contract for Sales - Manual Delta Accruals
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

we have implemented the Condition Contract for sales in an S/4HANA Project, and introduced the manual delta accrual document to manage both data migration and unplanned delta accruals.

While we are able to post manual delta accruals correctly using the RENT pricing condition (the CC is also updated inserting a new date in the settlement calenar), we encounter errors when issuing follow-on documents:

  1. Without specifying the RENT condition in the Condition Type Group for Accruals (as per standard configuration):

    • Automatic delta accruals are processed correctly.
    • However, the amount booked as "manual delta accrual" is not reversed during the final settlement run.

  2. With RENT condition specified in the Condition Type Group for Accruals (RENT condition type assigned to "Tgt AccReversal" as REA2 and "Tgt CType Daccr" as RED2):

    • The first automatic delta accrual reverses the amount booked as "manual delta accrual."

Could you please provide guidance on how to resolve these issues?

Thank you

Michele

entry.title: ERROR while doing GR
entry.content:
IAM trying to inward the material in migo through GR . It shows error

Period 009/2024 is not open for account type S and G/L 896000

 

regards

  Vijay

entry.title: SAP_FICO
entry.content: I already worked in end-user (accounts payable) full of SAP only. For the past 5 years and 10 months, I have worked  at Capgemini and IBM; meanwhile, I have a certificate from IBM learning SAP FICO, and now I want to change my domain. It’s possible. Then if they have 5 years of experience, they will consider it, or they will consider a fresher.

entry.title: Hi team, User is getting below message while running PPLA PO settlements in SAP. Can you help?
Amount is lying in customer account post reversing the billing doc
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created the billing document then reversed the same but still the amount is lying in customer account.
Thanks in advance;

Kiran

entry.title: ECC-EWM-GTS Export Declaration “Before PGI in EWM” -Bonded Warehouse
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Good Day

I have below requirement, kindly share your valuable inputs to define the FCD process in BWH.

Standard behaviour : SO -> Del -> ODO- > PGI in EWM ->OD->ECC-Material document-> GTS Export declaration, in this scenario export declaration created in GTS has all the required data and there is no issue here.

I think when the PGI is done in EWM, material document created in ECC, hope that is the reference to GTS for doing the “Export declaration”

Required behaviour: SO -> Del - > ODO->Picking Complete-> “NO” PGI in EWM -> Export declaration in GTS

This is for Free Circulation stocks.

Is there any process, with which we can do the “Export declaration” before PGI in EWM?

This is due to operational challenges as after PGI immediately the shipment leaves the facility and with in which if the customs clearance (from duty unpaid to duty paid) is not received, it will be an issue.

And hence we want to keep the PGI as last step, ie. After export declaration process is completed, business wants to print some carrier labels and want to post the goods issue and then shipment leaves physically. This would give enough time for FCD  process to customs.

Note: Client system is on EWM Decentral 9.5 and ECC 6.0

Look forward for your valuable advise.

Thanks,

Hari.

 

@sapewm SAP Community @GTS

entry.title: activate in spro to copy the path
entry.content: I'm trying to figure out how to activate in SPRO when opening the tree, being able to select the path and copy it and being able to put the path, for example, in a word, does anyone know how to activate this functionality?
